entry_conditions: oi build expands but price follow-through fails
expected reversal move remains larger than total cost
invalidation_conditions: breakout resumes with new volume burst
HMM or Markov regime shifts to continuation
spread or slippage destroys net edge
market_hypothesis: When open interest builds into a breakout but price fails and orderbook pressure flips, trapped breakout flow may unwind quickly enough to create a cost-adjusted reversal opportunity.
who_loses_money: trapped breakout participants whose positions unwind after failed continuation
